title: Tunisian Chicken Bake
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make dish that combines the spices of Tunisia with the comfort of a warm bake. Perfect for a cozy evening meal.

ingredients.name: tunisian spice blend
ingredients.notes: available at most middle eastern markets

instructions: Season the chicken with the tunisian spice blend and set aside.
In a large skillet, cook the diced bacon over medium heat until crispy. Remove from heat and set aside.
In the same skillet, sauté the diced onion and minced garlic until softened.
Add the diced chicken to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides.
Transfer the chicken to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Add the diced potatoes, cooked bacon, and chicken broth to the baking dish.
Brush the top of the chicken with the creamy hummus.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
